import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        tokens = list_push(tokens, parsed)
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    tokens = list_push(tokens, parsed)
  end
  let a = match tokens.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let b = match tokens.get(1)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end

fn list_push(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  __list_int_push(xs, x)
end
